tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

**Pre-condition.** Call `get_graph_schema()` (relationship labels) and
`get_templates_index()` (verbatim semanticIds) before composing any
Cypher. Invented labels

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value = 'Hall 4' OR toLower(p.value) CONTAINS 'hall 4'
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind, sm.id AS locationSubmodelId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.id, sm.idShort
LIMIT 20

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id ORDER BY sc.id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (assetAas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN hall.idShort, e.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, assetAas.idShort AS assetAasIdShort, assetAas.id AS assetAasId

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e)
RETURN e.idShort, labels(e) AS types, e.smId

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
RETURN hall.idShort, sm.idShort, sm.id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e)
RETURN e.idShort, labels(e) AS types

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id

MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
RETURN instance.idShort, instance.id, type.idShort

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.idShort = 'MiR100_001'
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (assetAas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN hall.idShort, e.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, assetAas.idShort AS assetAasIdShort, assetAas.id AS assetAasId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[r:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN e.idShort, type(r) AS relType, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN instance.idShort, type.idShort, sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
RETURN e.idShort, labels(e) AS types

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind, asset.assetType
